description: Your team's 7-motor clustered rocket generates excessive off-the-pad acceleration when all motors ignite simultaneously, endangering a sensitive payload. Open the clustered rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/clustered_motors.ork and set up an 'Airstart' motor configuration to delay the ignition of the outboard motors. Use an Estes D12 motor for the 'Inner tube' (igniting at launch) and Estes C6 motors for the six 'Outer tube' mounts with a 1.5-second ignition delay. Run a flight simulation for this configuration. Save the modified rocket design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/airstart_cluster.ork, export the simulation's time-series flight data to /home/ga/Documents/exports/airstart_flight_data.csv, and write a summary report detailing the simulated maximum acceleration and apogee to /home/ga/Documents/exports/airstart_report.txt.
